question.text: Tax benefits available at the contribution stage for NPS under Section 80CCD(1B) amount to an additional:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Section 80CCD(1B) provides an additional deduction of Rs.50,000 for contributions to NPS, over and above the Rs.1,50,000 limit under Section 80C. This is available under the old tax regime. **The Trap:** Rs.1,50,000 is the 80C limit (which includes 80CCD(1)). Rs.50,000 is the additional deduction specifically under 80CCD(1B). **Cross-Exam Context:** NPS tax benefits are tested in Series XVII (NPS chapter) and X-A (financial planning). This is one of the most commonly tested facts. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The total NPS-related deduction under old regime can be up to Rs.2 lakh: Rs.1.5 lakh under 80C/80CCD(1) + Rs.50,000 under 80CCD(1B).
